babyDevelopment: Fertilization occurs! A sperm meets the egg in the fallopian tube to form a zygote. This single cell divides rapidly as it travels toward the uterus, becoming a blastocyst. Genetic material (sex, eye color, etc.) is already determined.
bodyChanges: You likely won't feel pregnant yet, though some women experience light 'implantation spotting'. Your body begins producing hCG (human chorionic gonadotropin) once the blastocyst implants.
tips: Adopt a 'pregnant until proven otherwise' mindset

dont: Take any new medications without consulting a doctor
Eat raw seafood or unpasteurized dairy

travelAdvisory.note: Safe to travel. Stay hydrated on flights.

milestoneDescription: The blueprint of your child is now complete and traveling to its new home.
